page_content:
Formerly: MUSC699Z.

MUSC655 Theory of Jazz (3 Credits)

Analysis of jazz harmony, with emphasis on principles of substitution, reharmonization, and syntax. Topics may also include chord/scale relationships, phrasing, articulation, notation and orchestration. Restriction: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department.

Credit Only Granted for. MUSC655 ir MUSC699J.
